creator: churanov.port.maintainer@gmail.com
text:
This is a update for devel/boost and devel/boost-python ports from maintainer. The task also includes re-organization of the two currently present ports into 5 boost ports. This fixes the conflict of devel/boost and devel/boost-python.

Fix: 

1) Download http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-ports-200907241320.tar.bz2 and unpack under ports/devel.
2) Download http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-2009-07-23-20-10.diff and apply to /usr/ports/
3) Remove devel/boost and devel/boost-python directories
How-To-Repeat: N/A
